text: MetaboDirect requires a single line of code to launch a fully automated framework for the generation and visualization of a wide range of plots.

it requires a single line of code to
launch a fully automated framework for the generation and visualization of a wide range of plots

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect
super_pattern.relation: enables generation and visualization with single line of code
super_pattern.object: wide range of plots with minimal coding experience

text: MetaboDirect is uniquely able to automatically generate biochemical transformation networks based on mass differences.
source_excerpt:
MetaboDirect is also uniquely able to automatically generate
biochemical transformation networks (ab initio) based on mass differences

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect
super_pattern.object: ab initio networks based on mass differences

text: MetaboDirect consists of 6 major steps: data pre-processing, data diagnostics, data exploration, chemodiversity analysis, statistical analysis, and transformation network analysis.
source_excerpt:
The MetaboDirect pipeline consists of 6 major steps/
categories (Fig. 1): (i) data pre-processing, (ii) data
diagnostics, (iii) data exploration, (iv) chemodiversity
analysis, (v) statistical analysis, and (vi) transformation
network analysis

text: MetaboDirect can work with molecular formulas generated by software such as DataAnalysis, Xcalibur, CoreMS, or MassSpecWavelet followed by MFAssignR.
source_excerpt:
MetaboDirect can work with any list of masses and
their corresponding molecular formulas generated by any
other software such as DataAnalysis (Bruker Daltonics,
Bremen, Germany) or Xcalibur (Thermo Scientific), the
open-source CoreMS or a combination of software such
as MassSpecWavelet [46] followed by MFAssignR [47]

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect
super_pattern.relation: compatible with multiple formula assignment tools

text: The normalization methods available in MetaboDirect include max, minmax, mean, median, total sum, and zscore.

text: MetaboDirect calculates thermodynamic indices including NOSC, GFE, AImod, and DBE.

text: MetaboDirect generates Van Krevelen diagrams during data exploration.
source_excerpt:
During data exploration, MetaboDirect generates
van Krevelen diagrams [58] of the peaks with molecular
formulas

text: MetaboDirect can query the KEGG database to provide putative KEGG Pathway, Module, and Brite annotations.
source_excerpt: Direct can use the assigned molecular formulas to query

text: MetaboDirect calculates diversity metrics including Shannon diversity index, Gini-Simpson index, and Chao1 richness estimator.
source_excerpt:
Abundance-based diversity is measured
with the Shannon diversity index [67], the Gini-Simpson
index [68, 69], and the Chao1 richness estimator [70].

text: Rao's quadratic entropy is used by MetaboDirect to measure functional-based diversity.
MetaboDirect performs PERMANOVA for statistical analysis of FT-ICR MS data.
source_excerpt: cessing step) are transformed into Bray-Curtis, Euclidean,

text: MetaboDirect generates NMDS ordination plots for metabolomic data visualization.
source_excerpt: use any of the dissimilarity (distances) metrics mentioned

text: MetaboDirect creates PCA scree plots and biplots based on molecular composition and thermodynamic indices.
source_excerpt:
Additional ordination of the data is provided as Principal
Component Analysis (PCA) [75] scree plots and biplots
based on the molecular composition and magnitude-
averaged thermodynamic indices of the samples

text: MetaboDirect uses mass difference network-based approach to generate molecular transformation networks.
source_excerpt: in the different samples and edges represent the putative

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect transformation networks
super_pattern.relation: based on mass differences between peaks

text: Mass differences with a maximum error of 1 ppm are kept as putative mass-based transformations in MetaboDirect.
source_excerpt:
Mass differences with a maximum error of 1 ppm
against the reference biochemical transformation keys
are kept as a putative mass-based transformation, as such
small differences are unlikely to be observed by chance,
and thus, they may have chemical significance

super_pattern.subject: MetaboDirect mass difference detection
super_pattern.object: 1 ppm maximum error for transformation assignment

text: MetaboDirect can perform all analyses offered by other FT-ICR MS software except raw spectra processing and molecular formula assignment.
source_excerpt:

the analyses offered by the other available software for
FT-ICR MS data, except for “raw spectra processing”
and “molecular formula assignment
